action.reasoning: Observation: best checkpoint remains iter3_b5_8ep.pt at 0.4445 mIoU; further training attempts failed before training because torchrun rendezvous tried to connect via container hostname. Analysis: the root cause is launch/rendezvous rather than training, so replacing torchrun with an internal multiprocessing launch using explicit tcp://127.0.0.1 initialization should restore multi-GPU training reliably. Decision: rewrite train.py to use internal mp.spawn DDP with localhost init, resume from the best 8-epoch checkpoint, train 10 additional epochs (under the 20-epoch rule), and submit the resulting checkpoint with restored 512/no-flip inference.
